user.title: Set up paperlesspaper
user.description: Enter your API Key from the paperlesspaper app.

organization.title: Select group
organization.description: Select the group containing your ePaper devices. Each group is set up as a separate integration entry in Home Assistant.

devices.title: Devices found

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure paperlesspaper
reconfigure.description: Update the API Key for this integration entry. You can also switch to a different group afterwards.

error.no_organizations: No group found. Please create a group in the paperlesspaper app first.
error.no_devices: No devices found in this group. Please register a device in the paperlesspaper app first.

data_description.polling_interval: How often HA polls the API (60-3600 seconds).
data_description.reset_random_history: When enabled, the rotation memory for the 'Upload random image' action is cleared for all devices in this group. This only affects the list of images that Home Assistant has already shown — it does not change anything in the paperlesspaper app or on the paperlesspaper cloud. Useful after adding new images to a folder so the cycle restarts immediately.

error.polling_interval_too_low: Polling interval must be at least 60 seconds.
error.polling_interval_too_high: Polling interval must not exceed 3600 seconds.

upload_image.name: Upload image
upload_image.description: Upload an image to a paperlesspaper ePaper display.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The paperlesspaper ePaper display to upload to.

media_content_id.name: Image
media_content_id.description: Select an image from your media library or provide a direct https:// URL.

reuse_existing_paper.name: Reuse existing paper
reuse_existing_paper.description: If enabled (default), the existing paper ID is reused. If disabled, a new paper is created before uploading and its ID is saved as the new default for the selected device.

upload_random_image.name: Upload random image
upload_random_image.description: Picks a random image from a media library folder and uploads it to a paperlesspaper ePaper display. Tracks shown images to avoid repeats until the cycle is finished.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The paperlesspaper ePaper display to upload to.

media_directory.name: Media folder
media_directory.description: The media library folder to pick a random image from, given as a media-source:// URI (e.g. media-source://media_source/local/photos).

max_images.name: Max images
max_images.description: Maximum number of images from the folder to include in the rotation pool. 0 means use all images (default).

reuse_existing_paper.name: Reuse existing paper
reuse_existing_paper.description: If enabled (default), the existing paper ID is reused. If disabled, a new paper is created before uploading and its ID is saved as the new default for the selected device.
